title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 68. THE SECOND AMENDMENT FINANCIAL PRIVACY ACT

§3281. Short title

            This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Second Amendment Financial Privacy Act".

            Acts 2024, No. 585, §1.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 68.  THE SECOND AMENDMENT FINANCIAL PRIVACY ACT
§3281.  Short title
This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Second Amendment Financial
Privacy Act".
Acts 2024, No. 585, §1.
